text: Standing amid the bright space, I am struck by the interplay of industry and creativity. The colors are vivid, the atmosphere is charged with anticipation, yet the unfinished setup gives a sense of transition. In this place devoted to research and development, I feel a stirring of curiosity—a sense that I am poised on the edge of potential, witnessing the birth of new ideas. Being here, I am both observer and participant in a dance between the known and the yet-to-be-discovered.
